title: Default to rootless via Windows WSL prompt / Lock to WSL2
body:
Since we default to rootless via podman.exe, change the WSL prompt to default to the rootless user as well.

Includes two other minor changes:
- Forces machine init to always use version 2 of WSL to prevent unintentional usage of WSL1
- Masks a failing systemd service in F36 which relies on kernel functionality (psi) not present in the WSL kernel

Ideally, this PR could be included in 4.2.

Fixes #14814
Fixes #14155

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

```release-note
Prefer the rootless user when accessing the WSL prompt on Windows 
```
